snippet.title: The Cranberries - Zombie (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
The Cranberries - Zombie (Lyrics)

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Another head hangs lowly
Child is slowly taken
And the violence caused such silence
Who are we, mistaken?

[Pre-Chorus]
But you see, it's not me, it's not my family
In your head, in your head, they are fightin'
With their tanks and their bombs and their bombs and their guns
In your head, in your head, they are cryin'

[Chorus]
In your head, in your head
Zombie, zombie, zombie-ie-ie
What's in your head, in your head?
Zombie, zombie, zombie-ie-ie-ie, oh

[Post-Chorus]
Doo, doo, doo, doo
Doo, doo, doo, doo
Doo, doo, doo, doo
Doo, doo, doo, doo

[Verse 2]
Another mother's breakin'
Heart is takin' over
When the violence causes silence
We must be mistaken

[Pre-Chorus]
It's the same old theme, since 1916
In your head, in your head, they're still fightin'
With their tanks and their bombs and their bombs and their guns
In your head, in your head, they are dyin'

[Chorus]
In your head, in your head
Zombie, zombie, zombie-ie-ie
What's in your head, in your head?
Zombie, zombie, zombie-ie-ie-ie
Oh-oh-oh-oh, oh-oh-oh, eh-eh-oh, ya-ya

[Instrumental Outro]

🎬 REAL STRUGGLE – Official Music Video


Life is not always easy. Behind every smile, every dream, and every success, there is a story of sacrifice, pain, hard work, and struggle. “REAL STRUGGLE” is a Punjabi track dedicated to those people who keep fighting their battles silently and never give up.
This song reflects the reality of life, emotions, and the journey that many people experience while chasing their dreams. If you have ever faced difficult times, this song is for you.

In this Minecraft video on the Lifesteal SMP, I build an orbital strike cannon, and nuke a massive server wide battle, killing players in the process

Lifesteal Season 7 Team:  @rekrap2   @ClownPierce   @minutetechmc  

►Join My Minecraft Server!
JAVA IP: play.penguin.gg
BEDROCK IP: bedrock.penguin.gg Port: 19132

Orbital Strike Cannon by @cubicmetre : https://youtu.be/q78LRgHt_zU?si=FrcxKtJN5o8pzl6g
Note in this video I built the OSC Mk. 6.1, we modified it to remove the music disc system, and changed the auto firing mechanism to instead require an extra input to fire the nukes. Thanks @Willerhide for his help with this, and to @Dtowncat for gathering the materials and digging the area out.
I didn't build the minimal signature cannon, because I wanted to be able to store up 8 nukes to all be fired at once.
Also this mod is a must when building the OSC: https://modrinth.com/mod/techutils
It allows litematica to show you what you need to put in the inventory slots of containers such as barrels and droppers

snippet.title: Simon & Garfunkel - Bridge Over Troubled Water (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
simon & garfunkel - bridge over troubled water

thank you for spending a moment here with us. 
we hope the music brought you a little comfort.

feel free to subscribe if you felt the warmth of the music 🌟

· follow Simon & Garfunkel
spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/70cRZdQywnSFp9pnc2WTCE?si=dRUgTR5rT82g7Rn1Er4vAA
apple music: https://music.apple.com/us/artist/simon-garfunkel/461503

lyrics:
[verse 1]
when you're weary
feeling small
when tears are in your eyes
i will dry them all
i'm on your side
oh, when times get rough
and friends just can't be found

[chorus]
like a bridge over troubled water
i will lay me down
like a bridge over troubled water
i will lay me down

[verse 2]
when you're down and out
when you're on the street
when evening falls so hard
i will comfort you
i'll take your part
oh, when darkness comes
and pain is all around

[chorus]
like a bridge over troubled water
i will lay me down
like a bridge over troubled water
i will lay me down

[verse 3]
sail on, silver girl
sail on by
your time has come to shine
all your dreams are on their way
see how they shine
oh, if you need a friend
i'm sailing right behind

[chorus]
like a bridge over troubled water
i will ease your mind
like a bridge over troubled water
i will ease your mind

#simonandgarfunkel #bridgeovertroubledwater
